scripts.dev:electron: cross-env NODE_ENV=development wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8765/health http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.start:web: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
